eventPreCondition: Play if the Fellowship is on step 1 or higher on the Fellowship Track.
eventText:
Move any or all of the Nazgûl.
Then, if at least one Nazgûl is in the region with the Fellowship, the Fellowship is revealed
combatPreCondition: Play if the total Nazgûl Leadership is 1 or more.
combatText: If the Nazgûl Leadership equals or exceeds the total Free Peoples Leadership, the Free Peoples Leader re-roll is cancelled.
